svg.title: TesTly Entity-Relationship Diagram
svg.desc: Entity-relationship diagram of the TesTly PostgreSQL/Prisma database showing seventeen entities grouped into six clusters — auth and profiles, catalogue and scheduling, bookings and payments, results and markers, reviews, and AI assistant — with primary keys and foreign-key relationships annotated with cardinalities.
svg.text: PK = primary key. Cardinality on connectors: 1 = one, 1..1 = exactly one, 1..* = one-to-many, * = many.

g.text: FK relationship, arrow points to the child (the "many" side)
Booking is the hub: 3 parents, 1 optional slot,
and 5 child clusters (events, file, summary, panels, review).
20 models / 11 enums total; FaqEntry is standalone (not shown).
